ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "preprocessing_techniques" TEXT /* Preprocessing techniques applied to the data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Avro) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the feature (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "range" TEXT /* Range of values for the feature */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_features_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the label belongs to */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "label_type" TEXT /* Type of the label (e.g., binary, multi-class) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  "positive_class" TEXT /* Positive class for binary classification */,
  "negative_class" TEXT /* Negative class for binary classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_labels_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used in the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, F1 score) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was evaluated */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset or model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset or model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the sample belongs to */,
  "data" TEXT /* Sample data from the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_samples_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rids" (
  "rid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RID */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the RID belongs to */,
  "rid" INTEGER /* RID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rids_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viscodes" (
  "viscode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each VISCODE */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the VISCODE belongs to */,
  "viscode" TEXT /* VISCODE */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viscode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viscodes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "s1_values" (
  "s1_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each S1 value */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the S1 value belongs to */,
  "s1" REAL /* S1 value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("s1_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_s1_values_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "s2_values" (
  "s2_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each S2 value */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the S2 value belongs to */,
  "s2" REAL /* S2 value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("s2_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_s2_values_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "o1_values" (
  "o1_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each O1 value */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the O1 value belongs to */,
  "o1" REAL /* O1 value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("o1_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_o1_values_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "o2_values" (
  "o2_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each O2 value */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the O2 value belongs to */,
  "o2" REAL /* O2 value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("o2_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_o2_values_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the label belongs to */,
  "label" INTEGER /* Label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labels_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., model performance, data quality) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message for the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployment" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being deployed */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the model was deployed */,
  "deployment_status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployment_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
